name: bb_squeeze_expansion_ger40_m15
hypothesis: GER40 M15 frequently exhibits volatility compression followed by directional expansion; entering on the first close outside a Bollinger band after a BB-width percentile squeeze captures the expansion move, with ADX rising as confirmation.

signals.entry_long: bb_width(20,2.0) percentile(100) was < 20 within last 8 bars AND close > bb_upper(20,2.0) AND close > ema(50)
signals.entry_short: bb_width(20,2.0) percentile(100) was < 20 within last 8 bars AND close < bb_lower(20,2.0) AND close < ema(50)

regime_filter.skip_when: no recent squeeze OR adx < 18 OR outside session

exits.trailing: move to breakeven after +1.5*atr; trail at 2*atr thereafter
